Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts

The implementation already has the full Game of Life logic including reproduction. This test should verify that a dead cell with exactly 3 live neighbors becomes alive.

Use the example from the prompt: [[0, 0], [1, 0], [0, 1]] — dead cell (1,1) has exactly 3 live neighbors and should become alive. Verify that (1,1) is in the result.

Since the implementation already handles reproduction, the test will likely pass immediately. That's fine.

NOTE: Test 5 ("should keep a cell alive that has exactly three live neighbors (survival)") is being activated in parallel by another agent. Don't worry about that — just activate this test (test 6).
